description: Social media video performance analyst that fetches real-time public engagement metrics (views, likes, comments, shares, engagement rate, reach, impressions) for video links from Twitter/X, Instagram, and TikTok using web search.

example_response.platform: The social media platform (Twitter, Instagram, or TikTok)
example_response.influencer_handle: The social media handle of the influencer
example_response.video_title: Title or description snippet of the video
example_response.analysis_summary: Brief summary of the video performance analysis
